sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state
seg = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("Current nodes:")
for n in seg:
    rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
    cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
    print(f"  color={n['color']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

red_count = sum(1 for n in seg if n['color'] == 'R')
n_count = sum(1 for n in seg if n['color'] == 'N')
print(f"\nRed: {red_count}, N pieces: {n_count}")

# Check step 16 config for comparison
print("\n--- Step 16 config ---")
step16_found = False
for t in transitions:
    if t.before_frame.step == 16:
        step16_found = True
        for n in t.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
            rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
            cols = [p[1] for p in n['boundary']]
            print(f"  color={n['color']}, rows {min(rows)}-{max(rows)}, cols {min(cols)}-{max(cols)}, pixels={n['pixels']}")
        break
if not step16_found:
    print("Step 16 not found in transitions")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
